meta.title: marble_run rigorous paired visual diff — android reference (com.basegamelab.marblerun) vs v2 apple build
meta.method: Paired, per-state, per-region pixel comparison of android reference captures against v2 iPhone 12 device captures. Every finding is backed by a viewed image pair. Stills cannot prove motion — motion items are flagged as such.
meta.capture_integrity_note: v2 files 03-level.png and 04-pause.png do NOT depict a level or a pause overlay; both show the MENU at different board-rotation phases. The real v2 gameplay still is p3-after-coord-press.png (used here for the level pair). No true v2 pause-overlay capture exists.

findings.title: No top safe-area inset; iOS status bar overlaps top chrome
findings.fix: viewport-fit=cover + env(safe-area-inset-top) padding on top chrome (--fab-safe-top); verify in Capacitor config

findings.title: Saga topology inverted: reference is a straight vertical line of nodes; v2 offsets nodes left/right of the connector
findings.fix: lock all saga nodes to a single centered x; remove per-node horizontal offset

findings.title: Level-connector line is a plain single rope in v2; reference is an intricate double-rail wooden track
findings.fix: swap connector asset for the twin-rail track sprite

findings.title: Menu composition clash: v2 saga runs through/behind a large tilted board; reference board is small, top-anchored, chain sits below in clear space
findings.fix: shrink+top-anchor the menu board; place saga chain below it with no overlap

findings.title: Menu board rotates/animates (confirmed by three menu stills at distinct angles) and clashes with the static saga
findings.fix: either remove board rotation on menu or move saga out of its footprint

findings.title: Background pattern is flat dots + confetti in v2; reference is translucent glass-marble spheres
findings.fix: replace background tile with the marble-sphere motif asset

findings.title: Reference background is animated/moving; v2 appears static
findings.fix: add slow background parallax/drift; NEEDS MOTION CAPTURE to fully verify

findings.title: Coin icon on menu pill is a muddy multicolor disc in v2; reference is a clean gold coin with white $ and shine
findings.fix: swap coin sprite for the reference gold-$ coin

findings.title: Settings-gear icon is a different gear asset in v2 vs reference's clean light-grey gear
findings.fix: swap gear icon asset

findings.title: 'Marble Run' logo plaque renders larger/wider in v2 (possible sidegrade)
findings.fix: match reference plaque width/type scale

findings.title: Buttons: color families are close but assets, fonts and bevel styles differ from reference candy buttons
findings.fix: adopt reference button sprite + outlined chunky label font

findings.title: POSITIVE: v2 particle/confetti system is richer and better than reference
findings.fix: keep; a genuine improvement over the clone target

findings.title: In-game hearts are system emoji in v2; reference uses drawn glossy heart assets
findings.fix: swap emoji hearts for the drawn heart sprite in the lives panel

findings.title: Level coin-pill icon is silver/grey in v2; reference is gold
findings.fix: use gold coin token/sprite in the level coin pill

findings.title: HINT tile is grey-lavender with a silver coin in v2; reference is a warm tan panel with a gold coin
findings.fix: retheme hint tile to warm tan + gold coin

findings.title: No red glare / blocked-hit feedback visible in v2
findings.fix: add red glare flash on blocked/mistaken hit; NEEDS MOTION CAPTURE to fully verify

findings.title: POSITIVE: level board camera (straight top-down, fills width) and marble sprites are faithful to reference
findings.fix: keep; fidelity-fix confirmed in situ

findings.title: Settings is a full opaque PAGE in v2; reference is a MODAL pane floating over a dimmed board
findings.fix: render settings as a modal over a dimmed-scrim of the current scene

findings.title: Settings has no orange ribbon header and no blue X close button in v2; reference has both
findings.fix: add ribbon-banner header component + X close button

findings.title: Settings header is blue soft-sans 'Settings' in v2; reference is chunky white outlined 'SETTINGS'
findings.fix: apply outlined display font to overlay headers

findings.title: Settings toggles are orange in v2; reference toggles are green (accent-flip)
findings.fix: flip toggle accent token from orange to green

findings.title: Settings card is cream with peach rows in v2; reference is a blue candy card with white rows
findings.fix: retheme overlay card to blue candy + white rows

findings.title: 'Reset Progress' is a plain non-underlined label in v2; reference is an underlined link
findings.fix: underline the reset-progress link

findings.title: Owner-reported 'Settings button inside settings/pause' composition oddity is NOT confirmable from the provided captures
findings.fix: recapture a real v2 pause/settings overlay to verify; 02-settings shows no Settings button and 04-pause shows the menu

findings.title: Win header is brown left-aligned 'Level Complete' with no banner in v2; reference is a GREEN ribbon banner 'LEVEL 4 / COMPLETED'
findings.fix: add green ribbon-banner header with outlined title

findings.title: Overlay cards render opaque with NO dimmed-scrim in v2; reference floats the card over a dimmed board
findings.fix: add a dimmed backdrop scrim behind all result/settings overlays

findings.title: Win art is a generic gold-disc globe scribble in v2; reference is a gold CROWN
findings.fix: swap win art for the crown asset

findings.title: Win reward framing lost: v2 shows a bare '25'; reference shows a 'REWARD' label + gold coin '+25'
findings.fix: add REWARD label + gold coin glyph to reward readout

findings.title: Win primary button is an orange pill in v2; reference is a green candy 'Next' (accent-flip)
findings.fix: flip primary CTA to green candy button on result cards

findings.title: Win coin balance is an orphan coin stack bottom-left in v2; reference shows a coin pill top-right
findings.fix: place coin pill top-right and target the coin-fly animation to it

findings.title: Fail card: v2 has no red ribbon banner, no crying emoji, flat orange pill + text links, AND an EXTRA 'Quit' button the reference lacks
findings.fix: add red ribbon banner + crying-face art + candy buttons; remove the extra Quit control (reference has only Watch-Ad + Retry)

findings.title: NEW/capture-integrity: v2 files 03-level.png and 04-pause.png are mislabeled — both show the menu at different board-rotation phases, not a level or pause overlay
findings.fix: recapture true level and pause states; rename/replace the mislabeled files so the evidence set is trustworthy

findings.title: NEW/root-cause: settings, win and fail break the reference overlay language IDENTICALLY (cream card + thin colored top strip + orange accent + no scrim) — one shared OverlayCard regression, not three separate bugs
findings.fix: fix the shared overlay component once: ribbon header + dimmed scrim + candy card theme; all three screens inherit the fix

findings.title: NEW/detail: v2 result cards carry a vestigial 2px colored top strip (green on win, red on fail) — a flattened remnant of the reference ribbon banner
findings.fix: replace the top-strip stand-in with the real ribbon-banner component

findings.title: NEW: v2 win card adds a 'Replay' secondary link the reference win card does not have (reference win offers only 'Next')
findings.fix: reconcile secondary actions with reference (reference win = Next only)

findings.title: NEW/device: status-bar text is dark on the purple theme (low contrast/legibility) — should be light-content
findings.fix: set Capacitor StatusBar to light content

findings.title: NEW: v2 settings/result cards use a soft rounded body sans throughout; reference uses two distinct faces — an outlined chunky display for headers/CTAs and a rounded bold for labels
findings.fix: introduce the outlined display face for headers/CTAs; keep rounded bold for row labels

findings.title: NEW/needs-capture: app icon fidelity cannot be assessed — no home-screen capture exists on either platform
findings.fix: capture both home-screen icons and diff; owner flagged icon missing on apple
